title: The War of Art
author: Steven Pressfield
description: Break through creative blocks and defeat Resistance with 4 battle-tested skills for doing your best work.
longDescription: Steven Pressfield's The War of Art is a powerful manifesto for anyone who struggles to sit down and create. It names the invisible force that keeps us from our work — Resistance — and provides a blueprint for overcoming it. These four skills help you identify the forms Resistance takes, adopt the mindset of a professional, build unshakeable creative discipline, and connect with the higher source of inspiration that fuels great art.
